title: Build cockpit service dashboard in clunger

log.context: Build cockpit service dashboard in clunger

Done. Here's what was built:

**Files changed:**
- `/mnt/data/clunger/src/index.ts` — added `COCKPIT_SERVICES` allowlist (10 services), plus three functions: `restCockpitStatus`, `restCockpitLogs`, `restCockpitRestart`. Added route handlers for `/api/cockpit/status` (GET), `/api/cockpit/logs/:service` (GET), `/api/cockpit/restart` (POST), and the `/cockpit` page route with auth redirect.
- `/mnt/data/hello-world/cockpit.html` — dashboard page: service table with status badges, uptime, memory, re...(truncated)
